scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev:agents: concurrently -n scout,analyst,executor,treasury -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w @agenthedge/scout" "npm run start -w @agenthedge/analyst" "npm run start -w @agenthedge/executor" "npm run start -w @agenthedge/treasury"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n agents,orchestrator,dashboard -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:agents" "npm run dev:orchestrator" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.deploy:contract: cd packages/contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network xlayer_testnet
scripts.deploy:mainnet: cd packages/contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network xlayer
